title: Kyle Nguyen
html:
Stub. Member of Yahir's core OSU friend group; subject of recurring full-name jokes.

What we know

  • Wedding-list invitee (2025 06 22 wedding list for now).
  • Friend-group trivia (2025 05 11 how many times has owen been to the hospital in college 3 1) features joke options for his middle name: Kyle Phoung Binh Nguyen, Kyle Than Re Nguyen, Kyle Yung Man Nguyen, Kyle Pho Gud Nguyen.
